message:
📖 Mermaid: strip to minimal proven syntax (no subgraphs, plain nodes) Previous diagram failed to render on GitHub entirely. Replaced with explicit flat flowchart: no subgraphs, no cylinder shapes, no
, plain quoted labels only. Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com> Signed-off-by: Andy Anderson

files.patch:

repos to watch

activity/hr busy %"] - mode["SURGE BUSY

shared ledger")] - rv --> bd - ar --> bd - ot --> bd - sp --> bd - - sc --> ph["ntfy phone"] - rv --> ph - ar --> ph - ot --> ph - sp --> ph + CONF["hive.conf"] --> GOV + GH["GitHub repos"] --> GOV + GOV["kick-governor"] --> SC["scanner"] + GOV --> RV["reviewer"] + GOV --> AR["architect"] + GOV --> OT["outreach"] + GOV --> SP["supervisor"] + SC --> BD["beads ledger"] + RV --> BD + AR --> BD + OT --> BD + SP --> BD + SC --> PH["ntfy alerts"] + RV --> PH + AR --> PH + OT --> PH + SP --> PH ``` ---
